case_title: MATTHEW MILLER VS. THE GAP, INC ET AL

docket_entries.description: COMPLEX LITIGATION MATTER ON MAY-12-2026 TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION ON MAY-12-2026 BY JEFFREY S. ROSS. JUDGE JEFFREY ROSS, CLERK DANIAL LEMIRE, NOT REPORTED. (613)
ORDER AFTER MAY 12, 2026, CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE (TRANSACTION #79455192)

NOT REPORTED. COMPLEX LITIGATION 613, PREVIOUSLY UNDER SUBMISSION ON MAY-12-2026 ON DEFENDANTS' DEMURRER AND MOTION TO STRIKE. THE COURT, HAVING REVIEWED THE BRIEFS, COUNSEL'S ARGUMENT AND THE AUTHORITY ON WHICH THEY RELIED, THE COURT WILL SUSTAIN THE DEMURRER AS TO THE FIRST, SECOND AND THIRD CAUSES OF ACTION. IF PLAINTIFF SEEKS LEAVE TO AMEND, THE COURT WILL SUSTAIN THE DEMURRER WITH LEAVE TO AMEND. PLAINTIFF SHOULD SERVE AND FILE A STATEMENT BY FRIDAY, MAY 15, 2026, ADVISING DEFENDANTS AND THE COURT WHETHER HE SEEKS LEAVE TO FILE AN AMENDED COMPLAINT. (613)
